applets.name: Action Center
applets.description: Review recent messages and resolve problems with your computer.

applets.name: Add features to Windows 8.1
applets.description: A convenient and affordable way to add features to Windows

applets.name: Administrative Tools
applets.description: Configure administrative settings for your computer.

applets.name: AutoPlay
applets.description: Change default settings for CDs, DVDs, and devices so that you can automatically play music, view, pictures, install software, and play games.

applets.name: Color Management
applets.description: Change advanced color management settings for displays, scanners, and printers.

applets.name: Credential Manager
applets.description: Manage your Windows credentials.

applets.name: Date and Time
applets.description: Set the date, time, and time zone for your computer.

applets.name: Default Programs
applets.description: Choose which programs you want Windows to use for activities like web, browsing, editing photos, sending e-mail, and playing music.

applets.name: Device Manager
applets.description: View and update your hardware's settings and driver software.

applets.name: Devices and Printers
applets.description: View and manage devices, printers, and print jobs

applets.name: Display
applets.description: Change your display settings and make it easier to read what's on the desktop.

applets.name: Ease of Access Center
applets.description: Make your computer easier to use.

applets.name: Family Safety
applets.description: Change Family Safety settings.

applets.name: File History
applets.description: Keep a history of your files.

applets.name: Folder Options
applets.description: Customize the display of files and folders.

applets.name: Fonts
applets.description: Add, change, and manage fonts on your computer.

applets.name: Indexing Options
applets.description: Change how Windows indexes to search faster.

applets.name: Internet Options
applets.description: Configure your Internet display and connection settings.

applets.name: Keyboard
applets.description: Customize your keyboard settings, such as the cursor blink rate and the character repeat rate.

applets.name: Location Settings
applets.description: Configure your sensor settings.

applets.name: Mouse
applets.description: Customize your mouse settings, such as the button configuration, double click speed, mouse pointers, and motion speed.

applets.name: Network and Sharing Center
applets.description: Change network status, change network settings and set preferences for sharing files and printers

applets.name: Notification Area Icons
applets.description: Select which icons and notifications appear in the notification area.

applets.name: Personalization
applets.description: Change the pictures, colors, and sounds for this computer.

applets.name: Power Options
applets.description: Conserve energy or maximize performance by choosing how your computer manages power.

applets.name: Programs and Features
applets.description: Uninstall or change programs on your computer.

applets.name: Recovery
applets.description: Recovery

applets.name: Region
applets.description: Customize settings for the display of languages, numbers, times, and dates.

applets.name: Sound
applets.description: Configure your audio devices or change the sound scheme for your computer.

applets.name: Speech Recognition
applets.description: Configure how speech recognition works on your computer.

applets.name: Sync Center
applets.description: Sync files between your computer and network folders.

applets.name: System
applets.description: View information about your computer, and change settings for hardware, performance, and remote desktop.

applets.name: Taskbar and Navigation
applets.description: Customize the taskbar, such as the types of items to be displayed, and how they should appear.

applets.name: Troubleshooting
applets.description: Troubleshoot and fix common computer problems.

applets.name: User Accounts
applets.description: Change user account settings and passwords for people who share this computer

applets.name: Windows Defender
applets.description: Helps protect users from malware and other potentially unwanted software

applets.name: Windows Firewall
applets.description: Check firewall status.

applets.name: Windows Mobility Center
applets.description: Adjust display brightness, volume, power options, and other commonly used mobile PC settings.

applets.name: Windows Update
applets.description: Check for software and driver updates, choose automatic updating settings, or view installed updates.
